title: ChatEmojis
description:
A relatively small mod to add support for emojis in minecraft 1.8.9, with the discord emoji pack included.

For custom emojis, add the file to .minecraft/chatemojis. Most image types supported by Java are supported, along with GIFs for animated emojis
body:
A simple mod to add support for emojis to 1.8.9. 


By default, it comes with the discord emoji pack. For custom emojis, add the file to .minecraft/chatemojis (this folder should show up after your first launch with the mod). Most image types supported by ImageIO are supported, along with GIFs for animated emojis

Examples:

![ThumbsUp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aee6d5cfbbbd70670554217470cab25fd32c9123.png)

![100](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38044c16945425f26ba92fba49a67142ed1cbdd7.png)
